tools.name: predict
tools.description: Cassandra unified predictor. From leading signals in public data, returns what is about to happen to an entity — weeks early — across four verticals. domain selects the vertical: 'recall' (consumer product / vehicle / drug / device recall risk from complaint velocity), 'bio' (biotech NIH→trial→SEC c

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: List Cassandra prediction verticals available via predict(domain, entity), with what each predicts and its data sources.
